---
title: Data Cleaning
execute:
 jupyter: math4025
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from pyhere import here
```

```{python}
phot_colspecs = [
    (0, 4),    # YB
    (5, 14),   # GLON
    (15, 23),  # GLAT
    (24, 31),  # MWPR
    (60, 68),  # F8
    (69, 77),  # e_F8
    (78, 85),  # F12
    (86, 94),  # e_F12
    (95, 102), # F24
    (103, 110),# e_F24
    (111, 120),# F70
    (121, 130),# e_F70
    (131, 133),# N8
    (134, 136),# N12
    (137, 139),# N24
    (140, 141),# N70
    (142, 146),# f_SAT
    (147, 148),# f_MULTI
    (149, 153),# f_NOSRC
    (154, 158),# f_PCONF
    (159, 160),# f_CEXT
]
phot_colnames = [
    "YB", "GLON", "GLAT", "MWPR",
    "F8", "e_F8", "F12", "e_F12", "F24", "e_F24", "F70", "e_F70",
    "N8", "N12", "N24", "N70",
    "f_SAT", "f_MULTI", "f_NOSRC", "f_PCONF", "f_CEXT"
]
phot = pd.read_fwf(
    here("data", "MRT-phot.txt"),
    colspecs=phot_colspecs,
    names=phot_colnames,
    skiprows=38,
    encoding='utf-8-sig',
    dtype={'f_SAT': str, 'f_PCONF': str, 'f_NOSRC': str},
    na_values=[999.0000]
)
phot.head()
```

```{python}
phot['f_SAT_F8'] = phot['f_SAT'].str[0]
phot['f_SAT_F12'] = phot['f_SAT'].str[1]
phot['f_SAT_F24'] = phot['f_SAT'].str[2]
phot['f_SAT_F70'] = phot['f_SAT'].str[3]
phot['f_NOSRC_F8'] = phot['f_NOSRC'].str[0]
phot['f_NOSRC_F12'] = phot['f_NOSRC'].str[1]
phot['f_NOSRC_F24'] = phot['f_NOSRC'].str[2]
phot['f_NOSRC_F70'] = phot['f_NOSRC'].str[3]
phot['f_PCONF_F8'] = phot['f_PCONF'].str[0]
phot['f_PCONF_F12'] = phot['f_PCONF'].str[1]
phot['f_PCONF_F24'] = phot['f_PCONF'].str[2]
phot['f_PCONF_F70'] = phot['f_PCONF'].str[3]
phot.head()
```

```{python}
phot['F70'].isna().sum()
```

```{python}
for row in phot:
    if row['f_SAT_F70'] is '1':
        row['F70'] = np.nan
phot['F70'].isna().sum()
```
